meaning: v.松弛,下陷,下垂,(物价)下跌,漂流n.下垂,下陷,物价下跌,随风漂流,垂度
examples: Your skin starts to sag as you get older.
The shirt's cuffs won't sag and lose their shape after washing.
After dinner, it's a relief to be making for the lights of Sag Harbor ahead.
But Sag Harbor has been changing, rapidly, and to the consternation of some including Ms. Grosjean's group.
